lastReleaseMessage: v0.57.6 - asset-scale modifier + per-type consolidation, editor previews on 24 scenes, asset_preview + map_preview boards, tile scaler + gated chunk ground, tree-density knob; Spine2D direction set

barRaise.topFinding: The picture turned the right way for the first time in three reviews: the dirty tree now holds actual survival-loop work, the Oil-zero mission-fail wiring in gameplay.gd and command_post.gd, which is one of the four loop pieces every review since 06-08 named as the only thing that moves the verdict. The Lantern's 4-Oil/min drain has existed since v0.16.0 but nothing listened for the starve signal, so the fail state never fired in play; this change makes it one-shot and routes it to a shared loss overlay. The problem is it is still uncommitted. HEAD is 9ee2a4e (2026-06-08) for the fourth review running and the tree grew from six files to ten. The fix is no longer build the loop; it is land what you already built, then finish wave cadence, fog of war, and a win state.
